mapper.sql: token_hash, user_id, family_id, security_version, expires_at, state, pending_expires_at, revoked_at
mapper.insert: insert into auth_refresh_token( token_hash, user_id, family_id, security_version, expires_at, state, pending_expires_at, revoked_at ) select #{tokenHash}, #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{familyId}, #{securityVersionAtIssue}, #{expiresAt}, 'ACTIVE', null, null where not exists ( select 1 from auth_refresh_token_family_revocation where family_id = #{familyId} ) on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), family_id = values(family_id), security_version = values(security_version), expires_at = values(expires_at), state = 'ACTIVE', pending_expires_at = null, revoked_at = null
mapper.update: update auth_refresh_token set state = 'ACTIVE', pending_expires_at = null where token_hash = #{tokenHash} and state = 'PENDING_ROTATION' and revoked_at is null
update auth_refresh_token set state = 'REVOKED', pending_expires_at = null, revoked_at = now() where token_hash = #{tokenHash} and state in ('ACTIVE', 'PENDING_ROTATION') and revoked_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into auth_refresh_token_family_revocation(family_id, revoked_at) values (#{familyId}, now()) on duplicate key update revoked_at = values(revoked_at)
mapper.update: update auth_refresh_token set state = 'REVOKED', pending_expires_at = null, revoked_at = now() where family_id = #{familyId} and state in ('ACTIVE', 'PENDING_ROTATION') and revoked_at is null
